title: Sanitize Your CPR Pocket Mask
description: Clean and disinfect your CPR mask so it's safe for the next emergency.

dialogue.text:
Your CPR pocket mask hasn't been cleaned since the last practice session.
Let's sanitize it so it's ready for the next use.

Wash the mask with warm soapy water, rinse and soak it in a 1:10 bleach solution for two minutes.
Let it air dry completely before storing it in your first aid kit.
All clean! A sanitized mask protects both you and your patient during resuscitation.
